title: Extracted Catalogue Bulk Save Service Route
summary: Moved Local Studio catalogue bulk save from fake in-process `catalogue_write_server.Handler` reuse to `catalogue_bulk_service.bulk_save_payload()` behind the callable catalogue write service dispatcher.
effect: Local Studio catalogue writes no longer construct legacy HTTP handlers. Bulk work/detail updates now preserve the existing source validation, transaction write, lookup refresh, compact logging, optional build follow-through, and dry-run response behavior through direct Python service functions.
